label: Sanctions nexus & state-linked exposure analysis
description: OFAC SDN attribution across layered counterparty structures. Iranian financial ecosystem mapping — oil procurement flows, VASP wallet rotation, cross-border payment evasion. Russian sanctions-adjacent infrastructure including nested exchanger networks and high-risk payment providers. DPRK-linked financial infrastructure and revenue generation pathways.

label: Counter-threat finance & adversarial financial networks
description: Terrorist financing attribution and extremist network tracing. DPRK IT worker ecosystem analysis and cross-chain laundering pathway mapping. National-security-adjacent financial infrastructure investigation under high-sensitivity conditions requiring intelligence-grade reporting standards.

label: Cybercrime infrastructure & exploit tracing
description: Post-exploit fund flow analysis and cross-chain obfuscation mapping. Scattered Spider-related exposure analysis. UAB hosting and product infrastructure reviews. Fraud ecosystem attribution and illicit marketplace analysis.

label: Adversarial payment network & money laundering analysis
description: Huione and Xinbi guarantee system infrastructure investigation. Illicit payment provider analysis — Heleket, Cryptomus. Garantex-adjacent exchanger network tracing. High-risk RUB-denominated flow analysis. Cross-chain layering and obfuscation pattern development.

label: Strategic procurement & supply-chain intelligence
description: Drone procurement ecosystem exposure analysis. Dual-use technology supply-chain risk assessment. Sanctions-sensitive logistics pathway identification. Geopolitical risk analysis of adversarial procurement infrastructure tied to sanctioned jurisdictions.

label: Strategic intelligence production & external reporting
description: Regulatory intelligence reporting including VARA support. LE-aligned intelligence packages produced to evidential standards. Legal scrutiny-grade analytical outputs. Large-scale internal intelligence dissemination and fusion methodology training.
